---
title: "Exploratory analysis Eurofins data"
format: 
  html:
    keep-md: false
toc: true
---

This short report contains my exploratory work with the Eurofins study and contains some questions on how the data should be used.

```{r setup, echo = F, warning = F, messages = F}

library(tidyverse) |> suppressPackageStartupMessages()
library(here) |> suppressPackageStartupMessages()
library(sf) |> suppressPackageStartupMessages()
library(inbospatial) |> suppressPackageStartupMessages()
library(units) |> suppressPackageStartupMessages()
```



## 


```{r data-import}

library(readxl)

data_eurofins <- read_excel(
  here("data", "Eurofins_comparison", 
       "Results_and_Standards_EUROFINS_N_SIMS.xlsx"),
  sheet = "Results_EUROFINS"
)

```
